seoTitle: Pretty Beach vs Pretty Pine — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Pretty Beach and Pretty Pine. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Pretty Beach vs Pretty Pine: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Pretty Beach and Pretty Pine.
heading: Pretty Beach vs Pretty Pine — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Pretty Beach, New South Wales and Pretty Pine, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Pretty Pine has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Pretty Beach (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Pretty Beach or Pretty Pine safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Pretty Beach has a flood risk score of 30/100, while Pretty Pine scores 35/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Pretty Beach scores 64/100 for bushfire risk. Pretty Pine scores 57/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Pretty Beach or Pretty Pine?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Pretty Pine has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.5% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
